# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration

# Snapshot repository configuration
repository:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-backup-bucket
    endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
    region: us-east-1
    access_key: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
    secret_key: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
  schedule:
    interval: 24h
    start_time: "01:00"
    end_time: "06:00"

# Snapshot creation and restoration functionality
snapshots:
  - name: daily-snapshot
    repository: my-backup-bucket
    schedule:
      cron: "0 0 * * * ?"
